title: Smart Bird Feeder with Camera, Premium Bamboo Camera Bird Feeder, 2K HD Came Solar Powered, AI Auto Identify 16000+ Bird's Species, Bird Watching Camera for Bird Lovers
features: 🐦[The Smart Bird Feeder for Discerning Nature Lovers] Designed with input from 10,000+ outdoor enthusiasts, this Solar-Powered Bird Feeder with Camera combines 4W solar charging, AI-powered recognition of 16,000+ bird species, and a 2K HD camera with night vision—transforming your backyard into a live birdwatching sanctuary. An ideal gift for birding hobbyists and wildlife observers.

🀤 【100% Natural Bamboo Construction】Constructed from durable, eco-friendly bamboo, this feeder resists harsh weather while blending naturally into gardens. Unlike plastic feeders, its organic design attracts more birds, providing a safe and inviting feeding station. A stylish yet functional addition to any outdoor space.

🔋【Long-Lasting Solar Charging】 No more frequent battery changes—the waterproof 4W solar panel reduces charging downtime by 70%, ensuring uninterrupted bird monitoring. Perfect for environmentally conscious users, it merges green energy with smart technology for guilt-free birdwatching.

👍 【Easy to Install, Simple to Use】 Designed for convenience, it offers multiple mounting options: tree straps, wall screws, and pole attachments. The clear seed compartment allows easy refilling, while the smooth bamboo surface simplifies cleaning. A hassle-free setup for gardens, patios, or balconies.

🎁 【A Thoughtful Gift for Bird Lovers] Inspire a love for nature with this smart bird feeder. Whether for Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, birthdays, or holidays, it lets families bond while learning about birds. Capture precious moments and share the joy of discovery.

❤️ [Onhear Backed by Reliable Support] Enjoy peace of mind with our 30-day return policy, 180-day warranty, and lifetime technical support (12-hour response time). Built to endure, this feeder lets you focus on the beauty of birds, not technical hiccups.

🌃 [Stunning HD Footage, Anytime] Document birds in vivid detail with a 4MP HD camera and 130° wide-angle lens. The 3x zoom captures close-ups, while full-color night vision ensures clarity after dark. Observe feather patterns and behaviors like never before.

👪 [Share the Experience with Ease] Invite others to enjoy birdwatching! Supports 128GB SD cards (not included) and cloud storage (30-day trial). With multi-user access for four devices, you can instantly share charming bird videos on social media, creating memories together.
